hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then echo 'Running tests before commit...' >&2; cd /Users/jen-dev/projects/FitVault/mobile && npm test -- --no-coverage --ci; result=$?; if [ $result -ne 0 ]; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Tests failed. Fix all failing tests before committing."}'; exit 1; fi; fi
